overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing the protagonist walking through the historic city of Saint Denis at night. The character traverses a cobblestone plaza with gas lamps, passes a gazebo with NPCs, crosses a street with a tram and horse rider, and ascends a stone staircase to an elevated walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city plaza with theater and gazebo

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the cobblestone plaza toward the central gazebo, passing ornate benches and flower planters

entered.detail: large historic building with illuminated BALCONY signage and arched windows
black cast iron gazebo with decorative roof, centrally located in the plaza
large rectangular stone planter with blooming flowers and greenery
ornate black gas lamp post with warm yellow illumination
white painted iron bench with wooden slats

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wet cobblestone plaza illuminated by warm gas lamps. The historic theater building with illuminated signage stands prominently on the left while a cast iron gazebo sits in the center distance, surrounded by flower planters and park benches.

scene_state.functional_zone: park walkway with gazebo seating area

events.description: passing the gazebo revealing NPCs seated inside at tables

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past the gazebo where NPCs are gathered inside, approaching the street

notable_agents.action: group of NPCs sitting inside the gazebo at tables, socializing
NPC sitting alone on the park bench facing the path

entered.detail: tree with pink blossoms and green foliage
multi-story brick townhouse with shuttered windows and balcony

segments.scene_description: The character passes the cast iron gazebo where NPCs are seated inside socializing. A pink flowering tree becomes visible on the left as the theater building moves out of view, and historic townhouses line the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with tram tracks and horse traffic

events.description: historic tram passes by from right to left on the street
horse with rider trots past from right to left

agents.ego_description: crossing the cobblestone street as a tram passes, then continuing along the sidewalk as a horse rider passes by

notable_agents.action: historic tram moving along tracks from right to left across the frame
white horse with rider trotting along the street from right to left

entered.detail: tall red brick wall with stone trim running along the sidewalk
wide stone staircase leading up to an elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the street level where a historic tram passes by on the tracks. After the tram clears, a horse and rider trot past on the cobblestone street. The character continues along the sidewalk next to a red brick building wall, approaching a stone staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with stone balustrade and arched colonnade

events.description: character begins ascending the stone staircase alongside the building
reaches the top of the stairs and transitions to the elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs alongside the brick building, then walking along the elevated pathway

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with multiple steps leading upward
historic brick building with stone arches and columns facing the walkway
stone railing with decorative posts along the edge of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a long stone staircase flanked by a stone balustrade on the left and a brick building with arched openings on the right. Upon reaching the top, the character walks along an elevated walkway illuminated by gas lamps, with the building's colonnade visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wet, lamp-lit city plaza that gradually ascends to an elevated urban walkway. It begins by traversing a cobblestone square illuminated by warm gas lamps, passing a prominent historic theater on the left and moving toward a central cast iron gazebo. As the character passes the socializing NPCs within the gazebo, the theater fades from view and is replaced by a pink flowering tree and a row of historic townhouses. The scene then shifts to the street level where a historic tram and a horse rider pass by on the tracks before the camera follows the character along a red brick wall toward a stone staircase. Finally, the camera ascends the stairs flanked by a stone balustrade and arched openings, emerging onto an elevated walkway lined with a colonnade and glowing gas lamps.
